title: Add monero crate and nie-monero skeleton with key generation
description: Add monero = '0.21' to workspace dependencies. Create nie-monero crate with MoneroKeys struct: random seed generation, spend key, view key, primary address, subaddress generation (for unique per-session receive addresses). Include unit tests verifying key length and address format (base58, 95 chars for mainnet).
close_reason: nie-monero crate created with MoneroKeys struct: random key gen, subaddress derivation, address_for_session(). 10 tests pass.
